examples: His public persona is quite different from the family man described in the book.
The contradictions between her private life and the public persona are not always fully explored.
When voice textures fit the performer's physiognomy and gestures, a whole and very realistic persona emerges.
In the anonymous chat rooms, he felt free to adopt a persona repugnant to society.
Sin duda, la humanidad va a echar de menos a una persona muy valiosa.
